---
title: "Teaching"
description: "Workshops, modules, and teaching resources."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
  image-height: 220px
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---
